meta.source: GitHub API — repo name/readme search + package.json verification
meta.notes: Only repos with @circle-fin/* confirmed in package.json are included. Sorted by stars desc.

app-kit.notes: TarunKoushal6/J14-75 listed in dashboard but app-kit could not be confirmed in any accessible package.json (deep pnpm monorepo).

repos.name: Maje53/arc-payment-hub
repos.description: USDC Bridge and Send app built on Arc Testnet using Circle App Kits SDK

repos.name: mettin4/zeno
repos.description: Zeno - Arc App Kit Dashboard

repos.name: 0731jiangyujilv/polypop
repos.description: polypop.club — social prediction markets deployed from X conversations
repos.notes: package.json at webapp/package.json (monorepo). Also uses @x402/evm, @x402/fetch, @tma.js/sdk-react (Telegram Mini App). ETHGlobal submission.

repos.name: Avnsmith/arcfx
repos.description: ArcFX - Multichain DEX on Arc Testnet

repos.name: Doppler2u/Flowfi
repos.description: Pay-per-view content marketplace on Arc Testnet

repos.name: bayrakdarerdem/freelance-arc
repos.description: Blockchain-powered freelance marketplace on Arc Network
repos.notes: Uses Anthropic Claude API for agent-to-agent commerce demo. ERC-8183 escrow lifecycle.

repos.name: TS-mfon/proofpay-escrow
repos.description: Arc + GenLayer ProofPay escrow dapp
repos.notes: package.json at frontend/package.json (monorepo). GenLayer AI verdict contract on Studionet judges escrow release.

repos.name: TS-mfon/sourcebounty-arc-genlayer
repos.description: Arc + GenLayer source bounty dapp
repos.notes: package.json at frontend/package.json (monorepo). Same pattern as proofpay-escrow by same developer.

repos.name: Fbiondo00/PolyAgents
repos.description: AI-powered autonomous trading vault for Polymarket BTC markets
repos.notes: ETHGlobal Cannes 2026 submission. Multi-chain: Arc + Hedera + ENS. Gemini AI trading decisions.

repos.name: developermynk/Arc-Wallet
repos.description: Arc Wallet app
repos.notes: Dashboard listed swap-kit but NOT confirmed in package.json. Only app-kit and adapter-viem-v2 verified.

repos.name: mrrobot792/lumina
repos.description: Lumina DEX — reference implementation for Arc Testnet

repos.name: starlash7/Arc-test
repos.description: ERC-8183 escrow quickstart + App Kit playground

repos.name: circlefin/arc-fintech
repos.description: This sample app demonstrates a multi-chain treasury management system with cross-chain interoperability.

repos.name: circlefin/circle-bridge-kit-transfer
repos.description: A sample application that demonstrates how to use Bridge Kit to make cross chain USDC transfers with a wallet connect experience.

repos.name: dharmanan/Arc-Testnet-Bridge-Swap
repos.description: Arc Bridge Swap: Uniswap V2 DEX + Circle Bridge Kit integration for Sepolia ↔ Arc testnet USDC transfers

repos.name: mjkid221/fff-cctp-bridge
repos.description: The Workspace for Cross-Chain Transfer Protocol (CCTP) v2

repos.name: tomasfonsecsi/zentryx
repos.description: Stablecoin bridge interface built on Arc

repos.name: Emperoar07/Presto
repos.description: A decentralized exchange on Tempo blockchain

repos.name: linux070/stac-defi
repos.description: Stac leverages Arc's sub-second finality and USDC gas for frictionless, swapping, bridging, and liquidity provision.

repos.name: EggsLeggs/usdc-hopper-hackathon
repos.description: USDC Hopper is a lightweight cross-chain transfer application built with Circle's Bridge Kit and Arc to make moving USDC between networks effortless.

repos.name: aicarcwallet-arc/hackthone
repos.description: AI-powered vocabulary game on Arc Testnet. Earn AIC tokens, swap to USDC, bridge to any chain. Built with Circle Bridge Kit, OpenAI validation, and React.
